title: Seal of Gold
description: At the start of your turn, spend [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] to gain 1 energy.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic triggers at the start of the player's turn if they have at least 5 Gold. When triggered, it spends 5 Gold to gain 1 Energy.
